commands.review_summary:
This PR changes sandbox workspace skill mount resolution so missing host skill directories are created recursively and then included as read-only mount sources.

PR surface: Source +10. Total +10 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main source shows missing skill source directories are filtered out before read-only Docker/browser mounts are built; I did not run a live Docker repro in this read-only review.
